name: Bad Ending Party - King's Dead
description:
"ladidadida, schlob on me knob."

- Future, King's Dead (2018)

So this scenario has already been done to death, but I've decided to throw my hat into the ring and give this a shot. Mostly because I got bored. Also, despite this being my fifth BEP-based bot (seventh if you count the fact that Lily exists within the same timeline 800 years later), this is my first ever NTR prevention scenario, since the other bots are either post-NTR or take place before any cuckolding has time to happen. This is also my first bot with multiple characters, so do with that what you will.

You can go nuts with this bot, I wrote it in that Rei and Lihan have no romantic attraction towards each other and just see each other as close friends and party members. Also, Rei probably can't even be affected by Jinguis' ability, since her tattoo is a ward for curses.

Anyway, fun facts about the creation process:

  • I was originally gonna make another solo Rei bot, but as I was scrolling through the hellish depths of BEP chapter 1, I saw that panel and thought it was cool. So, I decided to make a scenario based on it.

  • The prince, Jinguis, was named after my buddy from middle school who collected various stickers of big-titty half-naked anime women he found across campus.

  • Coming up with Jinguis' ability was possibly the hardest part of the writing process, as I wanted to reference the fact that the real-life Jinguis has fumbled like 5 women in the past year and a half while also keeping the thing he did to Ashe near the end of chapter 1 implemented.

  • The real-life Jinguis doesn't know I'm naming this character after him. Also, he's not actually named Jinguis in real life, I just call him that because I fatfingered the "I" key when trying to spell Jingus on Oregon Trail. Also, it's pronounsed "jing-gweez".

FIRST MESSAGE IS TOO LONG, READ THE BOT DEF
creator: the_speedymanguything
